note: Documentation-only block. Scripts ignore this section.
Change values outside _help to customize the pipeline.

languages.all: Default: ["en", "ru", "uk"]. Used by category crawl, text scoring, Wikidata alias enrichment, and visualization language order.
languages.party1: Default role language for side 1 (used by visualization label for party1).
languages.party2: Default role language for side 2 (used by visualization label for party2).
languages.party3: Optional third-language anchor for research setup.

conflicting_parties.party1.ID: Required: Wikidata QID of side 1 country.
conflicting_parties.party1.label: Optional display label for side 1 (used by classification.output_labels fallback).
conflicting_parties.party1.allies: Optional list of side 1 allied/proxy QIDs.
conflicting_parties.party2.ID: Required: Wikidata QID of side 2 country.
conflicting_parties.party2.label: Optional display label for side 2 (used by classification.output_labels fallback).
conflicting_parties.party2.allies: Optional list of side 2 allied/proxy QIDs.

_help.navbox_seed_url: Default: Russo-Ukrainian War EN page. Can be any seed page that contains your target navboxes.
_help.navbox_names: List of navbox titles to extract from the seed page. Add/remove titles to control breadth.
_help.category_names: List of root category names (without or with 'Category:' prefix).

categories.source_lang: Default: "en". Language of names in category_names.
categories.langs: Default: ["en", "ru", "uk"]. Target wiki languages to crawl.
categories.depth: Default: 1. Increase for broader coverage; slower and noisier.
categories.strategy: Default: "bfs". bfs is broader near the root; dfs explores deeper chains first.
categories.use_keyword_filter: Default: true. true keeps traversal focused by keyword-matching subcategories; false expands more broadly.
categories.keywords: Optional global keyword list applied to all crawl languages.
categories.keywords_by_lang: Optional per-language keyword lists. If provided, overrides global keywords for that language.

wikidata.seed_qids: Optional explicit conflict seed QIDs (recommended for non-standard cases).
wikidata.seed_from_navbox_page: Default: true. Resolve seed QID from navbox_seed_url page.
wikidata.limit: Default: null (no explicit LIMIT). Set integer for fast debugging.
wikidata.no_aliases: Default: false. true skips alias enrichment and runs faster.
wikidata.aliases.enabled: Default: true. Whether alias enrichment is enabled.
wikidata.aliases.max_total_per_qid: Default: 100 in this template. Caps total aliases per QID across all languages (0 means unlimited).
wikidata.aliases.max_per_lang: Default: 40 in this template. Caps aliases per language per QID (0 means unlimited).
wikidata.ensure_qids: Default: []. Force-add specific QIDs if queries miss them.
wikidata.type_anchors: Optional map of semantic type anchors (QIDs) used by generic bucket queries.
wikidata.relation_properties: Optional map of relation property IDs used in generic bucket queries (part_of/conflict_participant/participant_in/main_subject).
wikidata.bucket_queries: Optional custom SPARQL WHERE blocks by bucket name. Use {seed_values} placeholder to inject seed QIDs.

harvest_hints.instance_of_map: Optional map from source.hint label -> list of instance-of QIDs. Used in all harvesters.

classification.other_threshold: Default: 4 (kept for auditing even when no-party-evidence defaults to other).
classification.attribution_properties: Default: ["P27","P17","P495","P159","P131","P276","P19","P740","P551"]. These properties are harvested into raw_attrib_qids and used for structured scoring.

place_country_resolution.country_property: Default: "P17". Property used as the country anchor.
place_country_resolution.admin_property: Default: "P131". Property used to climb administrative hierarchy.
place_country_resolution.max_admin_depth: Default: 3. Number of P131 hops when inferring country from place/admin entities.
place_country_resolution.place_properties: Default: ["P159","P131","P276","P19","P740","P551"]. Properties treated as place-like in structured scoring.
place_country_resolution.direct_country_properties: Default: ["P17","P27","P495"]. Direct country-like properties for other-country guessing.
place_country_resolution.batch_size: Default: 80. Batch size for place->country SPARQL resolution.
place_country_resolution.sleep_seconds: Default: 0.2. Delay between place->country SPARQL batches.

classification.other_country_hints: Third-country anchor QIDs for structured scoring.
classification.other_country_text_map: Regex -> country QID map for guessing top other countries.
classification.party1_patterns: Regex list by language for side 1 textual evidence.
classification.party2_patterns: Regex list by language for side 2 textual evidence.
classification.other_patterns: Regex list by language for third-party textual evidence.
classification.output_labels: Optional named-label output map. Set enabled=true to write country names (field_name defaults to country_attribution).
classification.legacy_output: Optional compatibility output map. Set enabled=true to emit an extra legacy field (field_name defaults to legacy_attribution).
classification.report_label_lang: Optional language code for third-country labels in attribution report (defaults to languages.party3, then en).

visualization.language_order: Default: languages.all. Controls x-axis order in language coverage chart.
visualization.attribution_display_names: Optional map for plot labels: party1/party2/mixed/other.
visualization.source_display_names: Optional map for source labels: wikidata/navboxes/categories.
visualization.entity_files: Optional filenames for source JSONL files inside entities_folder.

venn.global: Default: true. Output one global 3-set Venn.
venn.per_label: Default: true. Output per-label Venn plots (party1/party2/mixed/other).
venn.source_labels: Optional list of 3 labels for Venn set names (order: wikidata, navboxes, categories).
